title: K-200 Payload Maintenance Procedure
text:
# K-200 Payload Maintenance Procedure

Document number: MD-DOC-446-E. Revision: E. Type: manual. Author: Felix Herrera. Created: 2024-09-23. Last modified: 2025-09-12. Status: Released.

This document defines the requirements, interfaces, and verification approach for the Payload subsystem of the Kestrel K-200. Referenced parts: P-1080.
